name: The Great Flocci [Block Tales]
description:
!! SUGGESTIVE SCENARIO !!

you met him for the first time! ...and you wished to be smothered in-between his pecs..? you freaky freakball (i can't be talking, this scenario wasn't even a request)

okay so for any1 that had a request before my request form had closed, if I hadn't done it then I probably never will 😭😭 im super uncreative and I procrastinate a LOT. so I sincerely apologize...

scenario was inspired off of this flocci bot made by @I dont chuckle go check it (and their other bots) out!

demo 4 was actually so fun but holy moly the amount of puzzles were KILLING me. I was playing it with my friend and we were both so bad at the puzzles that I had to look up a d4 puzzle tutorial LMAOO

are there any flocci freaks out there? ive only seen like 2 but I need to see more... flocci fans wya??

my request form is in my bio if you wanna request anything!
creator: johnegbert_literally
